title: digitalis atlantica
intro: Digitalis atlantica, also known as Digitalis lanata, is a plant species in the foxglove family (Scrophulariaceae) and is a source of the cardiac glycoside digoxin. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include increasing the strength of heart muscle contractions, slowing heart rate, and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Digitalis atlantica include its ability to treat conditions such as atrial fibrillation, congestive heart failure, and certain types of arrhythmias. Digitalis atlantica is traditionally prepared as a tincture, tea, or dried extract, and is often used in herbal medicine to support heart health and treat various cardiovascular conditions.
